question: When people ask what to do after hearing Peter’s message, what two actions does Peter tell them to do?

choices.B: Pay a tax and offer incense
choices.C: Go to the Temple daily and never eat fish
choices.D: Write down a creed and send it to Rome

teaching.title: Peter’s response to the crowd
teaching.body: Peter tells them to repent and be baptized in the name of Jesus Christ, linked with forgiveness of sins and receiving the Holy Spirit.
